name: PT Lautan Luas Tbk
summary: PT Lautan Luas Tbk manufactures and distributes basic and specialty chemicals for industrial end-users primarily in Indonesia and the Asia-Pacific region. It operates through three segments: Distribution, Manufacturing, and Services. The company provides laboratory services and solutions for textile, paper, electroplating, leather, and water treatment industries, as well as offers integrated logistics and supply chain, waste water treatment, and information technology solutions. It serves the agriculture, animal feed, coating, electroplating, food and beverages, glass and ceramic, leather, mining and smelter, oil field, packaging, personal and home care, plastic and rubber, pulp and paper, sugar, textile, and water treatment industries. The company was formerly known as Perusahaan Andil Maskapai Dagang dan Industri Lim Teck Lee and changed its name to PT Lautan Luas Tbk in 1965. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Lautan Luas Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Caturkarsa Megatunggal.
